task_completion.description: Load the MRHead brain MRI volume into 3D Slicer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer application window is visible with the MRHead volume loaded, displaying brain anatomy in the axial (Red), sagittal (Yellow), and coronal (Green) slice views.

task_completion.description: Identify Lateral and Third Ventricles with fiducials and width measurements
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show fiducial markers placed within the dark, fluid-filled spaces of the Lateral Ventricle (frontal horn) and Third Ventricle (midline). Measurement lines (rulers) are visible spanning the width of these structures.

task_completion.description: Identify Corpus Callosum Genu and Splenium with fiducials and thickness measurements
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the sagittal view (showing the C-shaped white matter structure), fiducial markers are visible at the anterior tip (Genu) and posterior tip (Splenium). Measurement lines are visible measuring the thickness of these segments.

task_completion.description: Identify Pons and Pineal Gland with fiducials and Pons measurement
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiducial markers are visible on the Pons (large bulge in brainstem) and the Pineal Gland (small structure posterior to the third ventricle). A measurement line is visible measuring the anteroposterior diameter of the Pons.

task_completion.description: Save the fiducial list and the documentation report to the specified file paths
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Data' dialog or a file explorer window is visible, showing the files 'neuroanatomy_landmarks.mrk.json' and 'neuroanatomy_report.json' being saved or present in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/SampleData/' directory. Alternatively, a text editor showing the JSON report construction.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Slicer GUI tools (Markups, Ruler/Line) to place landmarks and measure
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the toolbar or module panel to select 'Place Fiducial' or 'Line' tools, and manually clicks on the anatomical structures in the slice views.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with the MRI volume and not just typing coordinates
integrity.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor is seen moving over the slice views, crosshairs are moving, or slice views are scrolling/changing as the agent navigates to finding the structures.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is performing the task within 3D Slicer
integrity.visual_evidence: The majority of the screenshots show the 3D Slicer application interface, not just a terminal or code editor.
